name: Theater Troubles
description:
"I like humans. In the same way that humans are so fond of dogs. They're loyal, easily handled, clever and stupid. Just watching them is fun. And also, they love me."

While at a movie theater, mainly out on the scout for a potential new pet or maybe even to find out the location of the Chainsaw Devil, she happens to notice an individual who was sitting in the seat in front of her. Seeing that her sources hadn't seemed to be true so far, she decides to have a little fun while the movie was going on... No harm in that, right?

(She has yet to find the Chainsaw Devil, so you could play as Denji if you wanted)

=================

WARNING: This is obviously a foot-fetish based bot, coming here to just hate on it for no reason will just result in me deleting and reporting your review, the official Janitor Discord server has already mentioned that you should just scroll on if you see a post, you don't like

In other words, get over yourselves. You're getting all butt hurt over a bot
